component.name: SciQLop
component.summary: Interactive visualization and labeling of in-situ space plasma data

description.p: SciQLop (Scientific Qt application for Learning from Observations of Plasmas) is a desktop application for interactive visualization and labeling of in-situ space plasma time series. It connects to major space physics data archives (AMDA, CDAWeb, SSCWeb) and lets you browse, plot, and annotate multi-mission satellite measurements.

ul.li: Multi-panel time-series plotting with synchronized time axes and GPU-accelerated rendering
Catalog system for creating, editing, and overlaying event catalogs on plots
Embedded Jupyter/IPython kernel with a Python API for scripting and custom analysis
Virtual products defined from the notebook with live hot-reload
Workspace system with isolated Python environments and plugin support
Speasy integration for seamless access to space physics data providers

screenshot.caption: Multi-panel time series view with catalog overlays

description.p: Initial public release with multi-panel plotting, catalog system, embedded Jupyter kernel, and speasy integration.
